response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates exceptional technical depth with 20 years of software development and strong expertise in developer tools, testing infrastructure, and CI/CD systems, they lack the critical people management experience required for this role. The position explicitly requires 2+ years in people management, and this resume shows zero evidence of managing teams, direct reports, hiring, or performance management. This appears to be a highly skilled senior individual contributor rather than a manager-track engineer.
strengths: Deep technical foundation across 20 years covering multiple domains with proven expertise in developer tools, testing libraries, CI/CD infrastructure, and shipping production mobile apps to top-10 ranking
Strong mobile platform knowledge from both iOS/Apple TV development and infrastructure work, plus recent experience with developer tooling frameworks like MCP code generators
Demonstrated thought leadership through workshop creation, open source project leadership (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and teaching core methodologies like TDD and test automation
concerns: Zero documented people management experience (job requires 2+ years minimum)—no mention of managing direct reports, building teams, performance feedback, or hiring decisions
Recent 7-month career gap for caregiving with no discussion of commitment timeline to step into demanding full-time management role requiring significant people-focused effort
No evidence of leading organizational change, cross-functional roadmap planning, or strategic alignment at team or org scale—background shows only individual contributor scale work

key_factors.factor: Expert-level technical foundation in developer tools and infrastructure
Recent career gap and unclear management transition readiness
